title: High-Frequency Identification of Equity-Bond Comovement: Companion Code and Derived Dataset
description:
Companion code repository and derived dataset for the MS thesis High-Frequency Identification (HFI) of Equity-Bond Comovement: A Present-Value Test with Operational Extension (Bocconi University, 2026).

Includes:

  • 7 modular pre-registered packages with 462 unit tests on synthetic DGPs
  • Authoritative pickle of pkg 07 (run autoritativo, label v2_signflip_run_authoritative_2026-06-22_post_bug2, sha256 a9c13a7b...)
  • Calendario eventi NFP/CPI/FOMC/ECB con regime classifier (events_with_regime_classifier.csv)
  • Calendar of contaminants for control window cleaning (5151 unique centers)
  • Altavilla TPQE factors extracted via canonical rotation
  • All JSON results and manifests from the run sessions 2026-06-22 to 2026-06-25

Not included (license constraints): Refinitiv Tick History intraday CSVs (RICs ESc1, TYc1, FGBLc1, STXE, FFc1-3, FEIc1-4). Reproduction requires user's own WRDS or Refinitiv subscription. Expected sha256 values are documented in data_manifest.json.

Four main findings:

  1. NFP/neg structural channel identified (β_str = -1.40, robust to multiple bond-piece specifications)
  2. ECB QE factor transmission monotonic along Bund 3M-30Y curve (β_QE = +1.07 at DE30Y, p≈0, 12/15 maturities BY-rejected at q=0.10)
  3. Residual third channel (Liquidity, Volatility, Correlation) NOT identified at q=0.10 pre-registered
  4. Event-driven concentrated strategy out-of-sample annualized Sharpe ~ +1.4 to +2.4 gross (n=24-104 events depending on filter selectivity)
notes: Deposit prepared for thesis discussion. Intraday Refinitiv data NOT redistributable; reproduction requires user's own subscription with sha256 verification against data_manifest.json.
